name: sprint-protocol
description: Codex-native sprint protocol for research, story writing, review, implementation, optional verification, and PR handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Run reliable Codex sprints from planning to QA.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-optimized sprint operating system. It turns raw founder requirements or baked planning packets into one or more independent sprint folders, uses Codex subagents for research, story writing, implementation, review, and optional verification, keeps long-running work resumable through sprint files, and can hand browser QA or final proof to Browser Use, ProofOps, GitHub, Vercel, or project-specific verification skills when available.
defaultPrompt: Use Sprint Protocol to research and plan this work.
Use Sprint Protocol to write and review stories.
Use Sprint Protocol to execute this sprint.
Use sprint-verify to run QA evidence verification when needed.
